list.name: Changes
list.comment: Updated the Project to containerize it.

task.summary:
Migrated into Microservices (Jun 1 - 5)
- Partitioned all Services into Modules - Added RestTemplate To communication over services - Added few more Controllers - Modified business logic
Fixed the issue with few services
feat: add Stripe payment integration with order success and cancellation handling
Updated the Project to containerize it.

MESSAGE.value:
Migrated into Microservices (Jun 1 - 5)
- Partitioned all Services into Modules - Added RestTemplate To communication over services - Added few more Controllers - Modified business logic
Fixed the issue with few services
feat: add Stripe payment integration with order success and cancellation handling
Updated the Project to containerize it.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Updated the Project to containerize it.
